visual_description: In a dimly lit control room, a man in a light shirt and headphones sits at a desk, looking intently at a computer monitor while another man stands blurred in the foreground. He adjusts his headset with his right hand, his expression focused as he watches the screen. The scene cuts to a crowded outdoor area where people hold umbrellas, followed by a close-up of a man in glasses holding a phone to his ear.
audio_description: The audio consists of low-level ambient noise and faint electronic hum, with no clear speech. There is a subtle sound of rain in the outdoor segment.
